positive: A soft, natural pattern of dappled shade — the mottled shadow that sunlight casts through overhead {subject_phrase} onto a flat, plain surface.
Only the cast shadow itself: soft-edged dark, semi-transparent blotches with gaps of open light between them, organic and irregular, exactly the way real dappled sunlight falls on the ground.
NOT the {subject_phrase} themselves and no objects at all — only the shadow they cast, carried in the alpha channel on a fully transparent background so it can be laid over any photo.
